fields.ApplyToObjectRoot: Whether the slicing material effect should be applied to the nearest object root.
fields.EdgeColor: what the edge color for new generated slice materials should be.
fields.EdgeStart: The start of the range of the edge color from the slicer.
fields.EdgeEnd: The end of the range of the edge color from the slicer.
fields._slicers: The list of slicers this tool has generated and/or is controlling.
fields._sliceMaterials: The list of slice materials this tool has generated and/or is controlling.

methods.CreateSlicer: Called when the create slicer button is touched.
methods.ClearSetup: Called when the clear setup button is touched.
